stemHtml: An aircraft flying under IFR in VMC experiences communication failure. Can the aircraft complete the IFR flight?

options.a: No, the flight must continue in VMC.
options.b: No, the flight must return to the departure aerodrome in VMC.
options.c: It is mandatory to continue the flight in IFR.
options.d: Yes, if the PIC considers it advisable to continue the flight as IFR.
